purpose: Expose high-level MetaBlooms operator commands and hide gh/jq/git/ruleset plumbing from user-facing Termux/PowerShell interactions.
hard_rules: User-facing Termux/PowerShell blocks must be one-shot and high-level by default.
Do not expose gh api, jq ruleset transforms, or long restore plumbing in normal chat responses.
Every command must write a receipt, print a copy-back block, and attempt clipboard copy when available.
Every merge must pin expected head SHA.
Every protected branch write must route through PR flow.
Every blocker must provide one safe next command or explain why no safe command exists.

commands.name: metablooms continue
commands.role: run the next known safe high-level action from a continuation context

commands.name: metablooms merge-pr
commands.role: governed single-owner PR merge with backup/relax/restore hidden

commands.name: metablooms sync-os
commands.role: branch/PR OS sync with validation hidden

commands.name: metablooms recover-last-run
commands.role: inspect last run directory and emit recovery copy-back

commands.name: metablooms inspect-blocker
commands.role: classify latest blocker and output safe next step

ux_requirements.continuation_prompt: compact unless final/blocker state requires full prompt
